commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an `OPENCLAW_ENABLE_GOOGLE_GEMINI_CLI_HARNESS` policy helper, gates Google Gemini CLI runtime provider/backend registration by default, preserves setup backend registration, and updates Google docs/metadata/tests.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +75, Docs +48. Total +138 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and `v2026.6.11` register `google-gemini-cli` by default, while the PR head hides that runtime registration unless the new env flag is set. I did not run a live upgrade flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the blockers are maintainer compatibility/product direction and missing contributor proof, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(google): gate Gemini CLI runtime harness behind explicit opt-in
target.body:
## Summary

Continues the Google provider rebuild by moving Gemini CLI runtime harness registration out of the bundled Google plugin default path.

- adds `OPENCLAW_ENABLE_GOOGLE_GEMINI_CLI_HARNESS` as an explicit opt-in policy
- keeps the bundled Google plugin on the official `google` provider path by default
- registers the bundled `google-gemini-cli` provider/backend only when the opt-in flag is enabled
- preserves the Google setup entry and setup-registry CLI backend default for compatibility
- aligns manifest metadata, onboarding copy, provider contract copy, public docs, and docs navigation with that policy
- preserves upstream Gemini CLI backend auth-bridge tests

## Compatibility direction

The setup-registry default for `google-gemini-cli` remains available, so existing setup-only backend resolution continues to work. The explicit opt-in applies only to direct bundled runtime registration of the Gemini CLI provider/backend.

## Metadata/docs alignment

- Manifest `providerAuthChoices` copy no longer labels the default Google group as OAuth-based.
- Provider contract copy matches the manifest/onboarding copy.
- The Google rebuild boundary doc describes the runtime-only gate and setup-registry compatibility.
- The rebuild boundary doc is linked from `docs/providers/google.md` and routed through `docs/docs.json`.

## Test plan

Broader Google/provider validation:
